name: Slack — Send IT Alert Message
description: Sends a formatted IT alert message to a Slack channel. The agent opens Slack, navigates to the target channel, and posts the alert with incident details from the conversation.
goal: IT alert message posted to the designated Slack channel with incident details.

variables.name: channel_name
variables.description: Slack channel name to post to (without #), e.g. it-alerts

variables.name: alert_message
variables.description: The alert message to send, including incident details (inferred from conversation)

steps.intent: Observe Slack (check if login is required)

retry.agentHint: If Slack shows a sign-in page, upgrade to headed mode with profile=persistent and ask the user to sign in to Slack.

steps.intent: Navigate to the target IT alerts channel

retry.agentHint: Find the channel named '{{ channel_name }}' in the sidebar. Look for a channel-item with data-qa='channel-item' or aria-label containing the channel name. If not visible, scroll the sidebar or use the search shortcut Ctrl+K to find the channel.

steps.intent: Type the IT alert message into the Slack message input

retry.agentHint: Find the message input field with data-qa='message_input' or aria-label='Message Input'. It is a contenteditable div. Type the message using browser_act type.

steps.intent: Human reviews the message before sending
steps.humanPrompt: Please review the message in the Slack input. You can edit it directly in the browser if needed, then click Continue to send it.

steps.intent: Send the message by pressing Enter

retry.agentHint: Press Enter to send the message, or click the send button with data-qa='texty_send_button'.
